headline: Late-Stage Chronic Kidney Disease Market Analysis Report 2026-2036, Profiles of Key Players - Novartis, Merck & Co, Pfizer, Sanofi, and Johnson & Johnson
summary: The late-stage chronic kidney disease (CKD) market is experiencing significant growth, driven by rising global prevalence of diabetes, hypertension, and aging populations. Advanced treatments like dialysis and kidney transplants are increasingly necessary as late-stage CKD progresses to end-stage renal disease (ESRD).
